## What type of PR is this?

- [ ] New Connector
- [ ] Improvement to an existing Connector
- [ ] Bug Fix to an existing Connector
- [ ] Documentation Update

## Validation

<!-- If this is just a Documentation Update, you can remove this section -->

- [ ] Using the latest version of the [surcom-sdk](https://pypi.org/project/r7-surcom-sdk/), ran **`surcom connector validate`** and all **CRITICAL**  validations passed
- [ ] **Installed** the Connector in Surface Command
- [ ] **Configured** the Connector with valid settings
- [ ] Ran a successful **Test Connection** in the UI
- [ ] The **Import Feed** completed successfully
